commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a288dced1b16f433458de24e1a5f00feef2a5d2b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR resets the progress draft gate after `onStart` rejects and adds regression tests for timer-triggered and direct `noteWork()` retry paths.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +38. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: create the gate with a rejecting `onStart`, trigger `start()`, and observe that current main leaves `started` true with no rejection reset. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and the checkout must remain clean.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed to rebase/port the fix and supply real behavior proof; automation cannot provide the required contributor-side proof for this external PR.

target.title: fix(channels): reset progress draft gate started flag when onStart rejects
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
